title: Minecraft QoL
description: All the Minecraft Quality of Life features that you will ever need!
body:
# Minecraft Quality Of Life features V1.0.0 This datapack has some Minecraft mechanics and features that should have been added long ago.
The features are not game-breaking but integrate nicely with the vanilla gameplay.
All the features work flawlessly on both single-player and multiplayer.

## Features
Chairs Use '/trigger Chair' to enable this module. To use a chair stand on the stair you want to sit on and position yourself so that you are in the block. After positioning yourself right-click and you should now be in a sitting position. Chairs despawn when you are no longer within a 5 by 5 area of the chair. This means you must repeat the steps above to sit in different chairs.
Telekinesis Use '/trigger Telekinesis' to enable this module. When you are breaking crops or logs, the items will go directly into your inventory without having to pick the items up.
This feature does not work for all blocks/items and currently only works for the Replanting and Deforestation modules.
Replanting Use '/trigger Replanting' to enable this module. Broken crops will automatically replant themselves. This will take the needed seed or crop from your inventory. Current support crops are wheat, carrots, potatoes and beetroot. You will need a hoe in your mainhand to be able to use this feature.
Deforestation Use '/trigger Deforestation' to enable this module. Breaking a log causes multiple surrounding logs to break as well. You will need an axe in your mainhand to be able to use this feature.
Health Use '/trigger Health' to enable this module. This will show the current player's health under their nametag. You might need to update your health (taking some damage) to update the initial health display.
Coordinates Use '/trigger Coords' to enable this module. This will display the current player coordinates in the action bar using the XYZ display (XYZ: 102 47 743).
DynamicLight Use '/trigger DynamicLight' to enable this module. When you have a light-emitting item in your hand (either offhand or mainhand) it will emit light by using the light block added in 21w13a. (works server-sided)
Invisible Item Frames Use '/trigger InvisibleFrame' to trigger this module. When triggered it will add the invisibility tag to your item frame(s). You will need to hold an item frame or glow item frame in your mainhand.
Direction Use '/trigger Direction' to enable this module. This will display the current player direction in the action bar using the Facing display with the Rotation Pitch and Yaw (Facing: North Rotation: 164 -24).
DeathInfo Use '/trigger DeathInfo' to enable this module. This will display the current player position in chat when you die.
Recipes Multiple crafting/stonecutter recipes have been added such as:
Stonecutter
- Logs -> Sticks and stripped logs
- Stone -> Cobblestone

Crafting table
- Charcoal 3x3 -> Coal block
- Iron nuggets -> Chainmail armor (same crafting shape as normal armor)
- Mushroom -> Mushroom block (same as coal block recipe)
- Dirt + moss block/ carpet -> Grass block
- Inkt sac + paper -> Name tag
- 3x Leather + 2x iron nugget + lead -> Saddle
- Glowstone (crafting table recipe shape) -> Shroomlight
- 2x Prismarine shards + 3x iron ingot -> Trident
Improved some game logic More features will come soon.
